subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
title: WE ANSWER YOUR QUESTIONS
description: Here we answer the most common questions about our equipment, purchasing process, and technical support.

items.question: What type of machinery do you offer?
items.answer: We offer industrial and construction machinery such as forklifts, scissor lifts, mini excavators, compact loaders, and specialized equipment for different industries.

items.question: Do you sell or also rent equipment?
items.answer: We primarily focus on the sale of machinery; however, we can advise you on options depending on your operational needs and availability.

items.question: How can I request a quote?
items.answer: You can request a quote directly from our website in the contact section, or get in touch with our team by phone or email.

items.question: Do your machines come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes. All our equipment includes a warranty according to the manufacturer’s specifications and specialized technical support.

items.question: Do you ship throughout the country?
items.answer: Yes, we ship throughout Mexico. Delivery times and costs depend on the type of equipment and the destination.

items.question: Do you offer spare parts and technical service?
items.answer: We provide technical support and assistance for spare parts, maintenance, and operation of the equipment we distribute.
